name: interviewgenie
description: Root helpers for local full-stack (Docker + Next.js web)

scripts.local:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml --profile ollama up -d --build
scripts.local:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml --profile ollama down
scripts.local:ps: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml --profile ollama ps
scripts.local:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml --profile ollama logs -f --tail=80
scripts.local:web: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml --profile ollama logs -f web --tail=100
